metadata.name: Valentine's Day Theme
metadata.description: Romantic pink and red theme with floating hearts

banner.title: Celebrate Valentine's Day at Hikari Sushi
banner.subtitle: Make it a night to remember with fresh sushi, premium rolls, and a romantic atmosphere.
banner.celebrationSubtext: We're open today - share the love!
banner.inviteSub: Treat your Valentine to an unforgettable evening of fresh sushi, handcrafted rolls, and great company.

quotes.text: Like our signature rolls, you're a perfect combination of everything wonderful.
quotes.author: Hikari Sushi

quotes.text: Our love is like fresh sashimi — simple, beautiful, and unforgettable.
quotes.author: Hikari Sushi

quotes.text: Life is raw and beautiful, just like our love and our tuna.
quotes.author: Hikari Sushi
